title: Color Format Converter
description: Convert between hex, rgb, hsl, hwb, lab, lch, oklch, oklab and named colors, with WCAG contrast hints and P3 gamut warnings.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing, color-space conversion and contrast math all run in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

input.label: Color string
input.placeholder: Paste any CSS color — #3366cc, oklch(0.7 0.18 250), hsl(160 75% 45%)…

wcag.heading: WCAG contrast
wcag.legend: AAA ≥ 7.0; AA ≥ 4.5 for body text; AA-large ≥ 3.0 for large text; below = fail.
